plugins.name: Catppuccin (PSMux)
plugins.description: Soothing pastel theme — Mocha, Macchiato, Frappe, Latte — powerline separators & Nerd Font icons

plugins.name: Dracula (PSMux)
plugins.description: Dark Dracula theme — arrow/rounded/slanted separators, gradient status, Nerd Font icons

plugins.description: Warm retro Gruvbox — dark/light, soft/medium/hard contrast, powerline separators & icons

plugins.name: Nord (PSMux)
plugins.description: Arctic north-bluish Nord — clean powerline with arrow/rounded separators & Nerd Font icons

plugins.name: Tokyo Night (PSMux)
plugins.description: Tokyo Night — night/storm/moon variants, shaped tabs, gradient status & Nerd Font icons

plugins.name: Rosé Pine (PSMux)
plugins.description: Soho vibes — main/moon/dawn variants, powerline separators, Nerd Font icons

plugins.name: Kanagawa (PSMux)
plugins.description: Japanese wave-inspired — wave/dragon/lotus variants, shaped tabs & gradient status

plugins.description: Warm green nature-inspired — dark/light, soft/medium/hard contrast, powerline icons

plugins.description: Atom One Dark — powerline separators, Nerd Font icons, gradient status segments

plugins.name: psmux-net-speed
plugins.description: Network upload/download speed in status bar — PowerShell native, color-coded thresholds

plugins.name: psmux-git-status
plugins.description: Git branch & status in status bar — branch name, dirty/clean, staged/modified/untracked counts

plugins.name: TerminalOS
plugins.description: TUI desktop environment — floating windows, taskbar, start menu, desktop icons inside tmux/psmux. Resize, minimize, maximize, drag windows. Launch terminal apps from a start menu with fuzzy search. Virtual desktops, session persistence, crash recovery.
